commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an `agent:turn:end` internal hook event for ACP turn completion, wires emission through `AcpSessionManager`, documents the contract, and adds focused hook and manager tests.

PR surface: Source +90, Tests +209, Docs +3. Total +302 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a current-main bug report. The review did source-trace a patch defect through the PR head, but there is no existing behavior to reproduce on current main.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining blockers are narrow mechanical repairs on the PR branch: constrain the hook boundary and isolate the new tests.

target.title: feat(hooks): add agent turn end hook
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a clean `agent:turn:end` internal hook event for ACP runtime turn completion. This split intentionally keeps the event as a runtime lifecycle boundary only; it does not claim transcript/session-write durability.

## Changes
- Registers and validates `agent:turn:end` hook events with `sessionKey`, `success`, `durationMs`, and optional `errorCode` context.
- Emits the event from the ACP manager after terminal runtime turn handling and awaited ACP event-delivery callbacks.
- Documents the lifecycle-only contract and explicitly states that this event does not prove durable session writes.
- Adds focused ACP manager and internal hook tests for success and failure outcomes.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: proves the clean split branch emits `agent:turn:end` from an actual ACP runtime turn, while keeping save/write-durability concerns out of this PR.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS at `/Users/mantis/Projects/openclaw-pr-turn-end-clean`, branch `feat/agent-turn-end-hook-clean`, head `9aecd5c23d`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: started the source-built Gateway from this branch with a temporary config/state directory, enabled the embedded `acpx` runtime plugin, loaded a temporary internal hook through `hooks.internal.load.extraDirs`, initialized a real ACPX/Codex oneshot session, then called `AcpSessionManager.runTurn()` with the prompt `Reply with exactly TURN-END-HOOK-PROOF-OK`.
- Evidence after fix (terminal capture):
```text
$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
9aecd5c23d
$ OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_ACP_BIND_CODEX_MODEL=gpt-5.5 \
  OPENCLAW_TURN_END_SOURCE_CODEX_HOME=/Users/mantis/.codex \
  node --import tsx .artifacts/turn-end-proof-run.mjs
{
  "ok": true,
  "head": "9aecd5c",
  "sessionKey": "agent:codex:acp:turn-end-proof-d8ad0d8d-4ab1-472a-af2f-7a79f82e5e94",
  "hookContext": {
    "sessionKey": "agent:codex:acp:turn-end-proof-d8ad0d8d-4ab1-472a-af2f-7a79f82e5e94",
    "success": true,
    "durationMs": 5211
  },
  "proofLog": "/Users/mantis/.openclaw/state/tmp/openclaw-turn-end-proof-CxqHQG/turn-end-proof.jsonl",
  "initializedBackend": "acpx"
}
```
- Additional focused validation:
```text
$ rg -n "agent:turn:save|onBeforeTurnSaveHook" docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane src/hooks
<no output; exit 1>
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts
[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 7.37s
$ pnpm check:test-types
<exit 0>
```
- Observed result after fix: the temporary hook captured a real `agent:turn:end` event from a live ACPX/Codex turn with `success: true`; the branch still contains no `agent:turn:save` / save callback symbols.
- What was not tested: production gateway deployment. This was intentionally run against a temporary local Gateway/config/state using source code from this branch.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: the proof uses local Codex auth copied into a temporary Codex home; hook handlers are internal and only observable when an operator installs/enables a hook.

## Testing
- Real source-built ACPX/Codex turn proof described above
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-runner.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-runner.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check`

## Related
Related #37833
Split from #71399
